## LibraryData.ILoadCollectionFromFileTreeParams.isBuiltIn property

Whether collections loaded from this source are built-in library data. Used to mark protected collections appropriately when they are captured. Defaults to `false`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly isBuiltIn?: boolean;
```
